ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Current fuel level of the vehicle */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the vehicle (for electric vehicles) */,
  "odometer" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Current software version installed on the vehicle */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Current hardware version of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_version" TEXT /* Version of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the agent was last updated */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., primary, backup, simulation) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing performance metrics of the agent */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Date when the agent was last tested */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the agent is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "ts" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle generating the data */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent controlling the vehicle */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Throttle position (0 to 1) */,
  "steer" REAL /* Steer angle */,
  "brake" REAL /* Brake position (0 to 1) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption rate at the data point */,
  "battery_consumption" REAL /* Battery consumption rate at the data point (for electric vehicles) */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* JSON string containing environmental conditions (e.g., weather, road conditions) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., normal, emergency, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data point */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Lidar, Radar) */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value measured by the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., meters, degrees) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the vehicle */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, malfunctioning) */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_reading_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor readings are taken (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_mileage" REAL /* Mileage at which the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_parts" TEXT /* JSON string containing parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "mechanic_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the mechanic */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Full name of the mechanic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the mechanic */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the mechanic */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the mechanic (e.g., engine, brakes) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mechanic */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* JSON string containing certifications held by the mechanic */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the mechanic (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being tested */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used in the simulation */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of the simulation (e.g., urban, highway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_results" TEXT /* JSON string containing simulation results */,
  "simulation_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing performance metrics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation data point */,
  "ts" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent controlling the vehicle */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Throttle position (0 to 1) */,
  "steer" REAL /* Steer angle */,
  "brake" REAL /* Brake position (0 to 1) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle's position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption rate at the data point */,
  "battery_consumption" REAL /* Battery consumption rate at the data point (for electric vehicles) */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* JSON string containing environmental conditions (e.g., weather, road conditions) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., normal, emergency, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES simulation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* JSON string containing changes made in the version */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is released for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
